channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AETHER] Aether Industries Board Meeting on May 15, 2026
item.description:
Aether Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with other business transactions.

  • Aether Industries board to meet on May 15, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Both standalone and consolidated results will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aether Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KOTYARK] Kotyark Industries: Gaurang R Shah HUF & PACs Shareholding Disclosure
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 for Gaurang R Shah HUF & PACs regarding the disposal of equity shares of Kotyark Industries Limited through an open market transaction. The disclosure includes details of shareholding before and after the disposal by various individuals and entities within the Promoter/Promoter group.

  • Gaurang R Shah HUF disposed of 1,16,921 shares of Kotyark Industries.
  • The shareholding of Gaurang R Shah HUF decreased from 3.38% to 2.24% after the disposal.
  • The disclosure is made under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers Regulations.
  • The shares of Kotyark Industries are listed on NSE and BSE.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kotyark Industries Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [HINDPETRO] HPCL: Vivekananda Biswal Ceases to be Independent Director
item.description:
Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) announced that Shri Vivekananda Biswal (DIN: 00977767) has ceased to be an Independent Director of the company, effective May 05, 2026, following the completion of his tenure on May 04, 2026.

  • Vivekananda Biswal's tenure as Independent Director ended May 04, 2026.
  • Biswal ceased to be Independent Director effective May 05, 2026.
  • The disclosure is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MANAPPURAM] Manappuram Finance: Management and Director Changes Approved
item.description:
Manappuram Finance Ltd's board meeting on May 5, 2026, addressed significant management and director changes following BC Asia Investments' acquisition of control. The board noted the investors becoming promoters and approved resignations of six independent directors. It also approved the appointment of Rishi Mandawat and Ashish Arvind Kotecha as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors, subject to shareholder approval. Dr. Sumitha Nandan was redesignated as Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson, while Mrs. Bindu A.L. transitioned to Head, Finance Center of Excellence and AI, with Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as CFO.

  • BC Asia Investments acquired control, becoming promoters of Manappuram Finance.
  • Six independent directors resigned effective May 5, 2026.
  • Rishi Mandawat and Ashish Arvind Kotecha appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors.
  • Dr. Sumitha Nandan redesignated as Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson.
  • Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as CFO, replacing Mrs. Bindu A.L.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANAPPURAM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PRICOLLTD] Pricol Ltd Board Meeting on 14 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Pricol Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (Standalone & Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting is being held pursuant to Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.

  • Pricol Ltd's board will meet on May 14, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The meeting adheres to SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pricol Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NUKLEUS] Nukleus Office Solutions Leases 75,000 Sq. Ft. in Noida
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd has executed Letters of Intent (LOIs) to lease approximately 75,000 sq. ft. of commercial office space at Okaya Centre, Sector 62, Noida, Uttar Pradesh. The agreement with OESPL Private Limited involves leasing 25,000 sq. ft. in Tower 1 and 50,000 sq. ft. in Tower 3 for a term of 5 years with a renewal option. This expansion aims to strengthen the company's presence and scale its co-working and managed office business.

  • Nukleus leases 75,000 sq. ft. at Okaya Centre, Noida for expansion.
  • LOIs signed for Tower 1 (25,000 sq. ft.) and Tower 3 (50,000 sq. ft.).
  • Lease tenure is 5 years with a renewal option.
  • Agreement is with OESPL Private Limited for co-working operations.
  • No related party transactions involved in the leasing agreement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MANAPPURAM] Manappuram Finance: Director Changes & Investor Control Noted
item.description:
Manappuram Finance Ltd's board meeting on May 5, 2026, addressed significant changes following investments by BC Asia Investments XXV Limited and BC Asia Investments XIV Limited. The investors have acquired control and become promoters. Six independent directors resigned, while two new non-executive, non-independent directors nominated by the investors were appointed, pending shareholder approval. Dr. Sumitha Nandan was redesignated as Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson, and Mrs. Bindu A.L. transitioned to Head, Finance Center of Excellence and AI, with Mr. Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as CFO.

  • BC Asia Investments acquires control, becoming promoters of Manappuram Finance.
  • Six independent directors resign effective May 5, 2026.
  • Rishi Mandawat and Ashish Arvind Kotecha appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors.
  • Dr. Sumitha Nandan redesignated as Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson.
  • Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as Chief Financial Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANAPPURAM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MANAPPURAM] Manappuram Finance: Management Changes Approved
item.description:
Manappuram Finance Ltd. announced several management changes following the acquisition of control by BC Asia Investments XXV Limited and BC Asia Investments XIV Limited. These changes include the resignation of six Non-Executive Independent Directors, the appointment of two Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors, a change in designation for Dr. Sumitha Nandan to Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson, and a change in designation for Mrs. Bindu A.L. to Head, Finance Center of Excellence and AI, with Mr. Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer. The board also approved the appointment of four Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors, all effective May 5, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

  • BC Asia Investments acquired control, becoming promoters of Manappuram Finance.
  • Six Non-Executive Independent Directors resigned effective May 5, 2026.
  • Rishi Mandawat and Ashish Arvind Kotecha appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Directors.
  • Dr. Sumitha Nandan designated as Executive Director and Vice-Chairperson.
  • Buvanesh Tharashankar appointed as Chief Financial Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANAPPURAM FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CINELINE] Cineline India: Promoter Releases Encumbered Shares
item.description:
Cineline India Ltd has received disclosures regarding the release of encumbered shares by promoters, including Himanshu Babubhai Kanakia, Rasesh Kanakia, Rupal Kanakia and Hiral Kanakia, under SEBI regulations. The release of pledged shares occurred on April 29, 2026. The shares were previously pledged as collateral security.

  • Promoters Himanshu and Rasesh Kanakia, Rupal and Hiral Kanakia released pledged shares on April 29, 2026.
  • A total of 7,12,000 equity shares of Cineline India Limited were released.
  • The shares were pledged to Motilal Oswal Financial Services and Sharekhan Limited as collateral security.
  • The disclosure is made under Regulation 31 of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cineline India Limited | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SHRIRAMFIN] Shriram Finance: Promoter Encumbrance Disclosure Refiled
item.description:
Shriram Finance Ltd. has refiled Annexure II regarding the disclosure of reasons for encumbrance on shares held by promoters/promoter groups. This relates to transfer restrictions on shares of Shriram Finance Limited under a shareholders agreement (SHA) executed between MUFG Bank Ltd., Shriram Capital Private Limited, Shriram Ownership Trust, Shriwell Trust, Sanlam Life Insurance Limited, Sanlam Emerging Markets (Mauritius) Limited and Shriram Value Services Limited. The initial filing was made on April 17, 2026, and a corrigendum was filed on April 29, 2026, following BSE Limited's feedback.

  • Revised filing addresses transfer restrictions on promoter shares.
  • Restrictions are part of a shareholders agreement with multiple entities.
  • Sanlam Life Insurance Limited is subject to transfer restrictions.
  • Initial filing was made on April 17, 2026, with a corrigendum on April 29, 2026.
  • Refiling was prompted by BSE Limited's request for a complete Annexure II.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Finance Ltd | Category: Regulatory
